channel.title: Simple Patch Finder - All patches RSS
channel.description: Latest ArcGIS and Esri patches from Simple Patch Finder.

item.title: ArcGIS Server Parcel Fabric Build Extent Patch 2 (S-111-P-1396)
item.description: Version: 11.1 | Release date: 02/19/2026 | Products: ArcGIS Enterprise, ArcGIS Server | Esri patch page: https://support.esri.com/en-us/patches-updates/2026/arcgis-server-parcel-fabric-build-extent-patch-2
